'''Sonn Vilmari''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colundra sector/Legends|Colundra sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==Description==
Sonn Vilmari was an [[Ocean/Legends|oceanic]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] that was home to the [[Pan-preneur]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="TYoO" />
